audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass. Children 6 and under are admitted free. coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass. Children 6 and under are admitted free. The pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each. Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old.
